body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Add GPU slabplanet runs reading albedo from a static input file and from a temporally-varying input file.

closes #590
part of #390 

note: this PR changes GPU runs to soft fail conservation checks. I've opened an issue here so we remember to revisit this: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/607
note also: we can't currently show animations for these runs because they aren't GPU-compatible, but we have an issue for this too https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/613

### Current status
- conservation plots look different between CPU and GPU runs

### To do
- [x] double check that all runs are outputting plots
title: add GPU slabplanet file read albedo runs
